column8: We would go for a swim if the day were not so_________and cold. (boring or dull)
column9: I started reading the new book, found it__________and put it aside. (boring or dull)
column10: Don't you see that these false friends of yours are using you? Oh, Jack, how can you be so__________? (boring or dull)
column11: Jane preferred young people who could entertain her and make her laugh but not________boys like Roy who kept silent most of the time. (boring or dull)
column12: The play was so__________that we decided to leave after the first act. (boring or dull)
column13: The colours of the old picture were__________and at first sight I didn't like it or pay much attention on it. (boring or dull)
column14: I hate arranging books on the shelves and find it monotonous and__________ . (boring or dull)
column15: The razor blade was old and__________and needed replacing. (boring or dull)
